{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320155917FCF04EC57F913C9217ED"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7525780356991894334","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"节奏很快，内容有一点跳脱，不够细腻，看的进去，还不错"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1752237985,"group_id":"7525731295255612440","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N8X8c7imyrghC8L/yLP4Zvuk4nTp4m5TsJxrQgCnIgfZ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1851996328955776","user_name":"寄望天"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1851996328955776","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.1"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7525731295255612440","book_info":{"abstract":"社畜苏砚尘穿越修仙界，成了流云宗炼气三层的“万年废柴”，却意外绑定爱撒娇的女系统“瑶光”——吐槽越狠，赚的“吐槽值”越多，功法、丹药、看破弱点的“真实之眼”随手兑换。
于是，修仙界多了个画风清奇的存在：别人苦修时，他靠骂对手“发型太丑”偷偷变强；宗门大比上，他“运气爆棚”吊打天才，一脸无辜：“可能对方脚滑？”秘境探险中，他假装拖后腿，实则带队友躺赢，还被吐槽“运气好到诡异”。
冷艳的大师姐凌清寒看穿他的伪装，眼底藏着温柔；狡黠的楚瑶光想投资他，反被“地球营销学”坑得跳脚；毒术超群的夜琉璃成了他的小尾巴，用毒针绣“平安符”相赠……
从凡域废柴到仙域传奇，他暴打反派、破解秘境，护爹娘、陪兄弟，一路吐槽一路爽。
面对满世界的惊叹，苏砚尘叼着草根摆手：“贫道真是废柴……哎，仙子别动手，吐槽你穿得花真不是故意的！”
系统瑶光翻眼：【刚骂完她，吐槽值够兑神功了。】
这是一个“吐槽即正义”的故事——能用嘴炮骂赢天劫的男人，怎么可能是真废柴？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2odde19825be838fd925900a3af2fd3a29~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"寄望天","author_id":"","book_id":"7525731295255612440","book_name":"贫道真不是废柴啊","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#203068","creation_status":"4","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":93,"name":"扮猪吃虎","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=93&name=扮猪吃虎&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":91,"name":"多女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=91&name=多女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7525731353321538072","read_count":"0","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"347750"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"155","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,多女主,扮猪吃虎","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2odde19825be838fd925900a3af2fd3a29~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779177557&x-signature=f2xH5bpmaWRT5DOH6vsxhJSuPlA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1851996328955776","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"18"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320155917FCF04EC57F913C9217ED"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":""},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded
